{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Damascan Traveler
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] fears meeting a [[Damascan Traveler]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Damascan Traveler]] killed [[Simon's mother]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
